entity.name: AppBase

datetime.name: todayDateT
datetime.title: Today date
datetime.help: Allows changing the current date when on a testing environment for running tests.

many-to-one.name: defaultPartnerLocalization
many-to-one.title: Default Partner Localization
many-to-one.help: Allows defining a default localization composed of a language, date format, and number format when creating a partner. This is the language and the date/number formats of documents that will be generated for this partner: quotations, purchase orders, invoices, delivery notes, etc.

boolean.name: emailAccountByUser
boolean.title: Manage mail account by user
boolean.help: If you enable this option, it allows attaching an email account to a user, a new Email accounts tab will appear on the user form. They can then send emails with their own email accounts. If the option is disabled, users will send emails from the email account of the company they are attached to.

boolean.name: emailAccountByCompany
boolean.title: Manage mail account by company
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, an email account is associated at the company level, and users will send emails from this general account. A new Email accounts tab will appear on the company form.

string.name: qasWsdlUrl
string.title: URL to QAS WSDL
string.help: Connection URL to the QAS Webservice.

string.name: draftPrefix
string.title: Draft prefix for sequences
string.help: Allows defining a prefix for sequences in draft status. The default value is #.

integer.name: mapApiSelect
integer.title: Mapping service provider
integer.help: You can select whether the maps available in Axelor (customer/prospect localization) will use Open Street Map or Google Maps. This feature also concerns distance calculation between 2 cities for kilometric expenses. Note that with Google Maps, API fees may apply above a certain number of requests.

string.name: googleMapsApiKey
string.title: Google Maps API key
string.help: You must enter here the key provided by Google required for the interface to work.

string.name: currencyWsURL
string.title: Currency Ws URL
string.help: You can select here the web service used for currency conversion rate management. You can choose between ECB (European Central Bank) which is free or Fixer. Fixer is a freemium solution that requires an API key for activation in the tool. It is usable in its free version, but the paid version offers more features.

string.name: fixerApiKey
string.title: Fixer Api key
string.help: You must enter here the key provided by Fixer required for the interface to work.

boolean.name: isFixerAPIPaid
boolean.title: Paid fixer API
boolean.help: If you use a paid version of Fixer you must check this box.

one-to-many.name: currencyConversionLineList
one-to-many.title: Currency conversion table
one-to-many.help: This table lists the different currencies for which you want to manage conversion in the software. By clicking + you can add a new currency conversion, either by manually entering the conversion rate, or by automatically retrieving the current rate via the ECB or Fixer web service that you configured in the Interfaces tab.

boolean.name: hasQasValidation
boolean.title: Use QAS Validation
boolean.help: Allows QAS to externally verify address formatting.

integer.name: productInAtiSelect
integer.title: Products ATI/WT
integer.help: You can choose whether prices defined on product forms are always excluding tax, always including tax, by default excluding tax, or by default including tax. The by default options allow modification on a case-by-case basis (via a checkbox) of the price type used on the product form.

integer.name: nbDecimalDigitForUnitPrice
integer.title: Nb of digits for unit prices
integer.help: Allows defining the number of decimal places for unit prices.

integer.name: nbDecimalDigitForQty
integer.title: Nb of digits for quantities
integer.help: Allows defining the number of decimal places for quantities.

integer.name: nbDecimalDigitForTaxRate
integer.title: Nb of digits for tax rate
integer.help: Allows defining the number of decimal places for tax rates.

boolean.name: isRegroupProductsOnPrintings
boolean.title: Regroup products on printings
boolean.help: Enable the ability to group lines by products in printing document generations (quotations/sale and purchase orders, stock moves, invoices).

integer.name: computeMethodDiscountSelect
integer.title: Compute Method for Discounts
integer.help: This configuration defines how discounts appear on quotations. If the discount is calculated separately, it appears on quotation lines with a discounted unit price. If the discount is included in the unit price (and in the replace type unit price in price lists), the discount does not appear on the quotation line and is directly integrated into the unit price.

string.name: timeLoggingPreferenceSelect
string.title: Time logging preference
string.help: Allows defining the default time entry unit for employees on timesheets. This default value can then be defined per employee on their form, in the timesheets tab.

decimal.name: dailyWorkHours
decimal.title: Daily Work Hours
decimal.help: Allows defining by default the number of daily work hours when creating a new employee (field visible in the employment contract tab - contractual information).

many-to-one.name: unitDays
many-to-one.title: Days Unit
many-to-one.help: Allows defining the default unit for days in the software. Logically set the value to Day.

many-to-one.name: unitHours
many-to-one.title: Hours Unit
many-to-one.help: Allows defining the default unit for hours in the software. Logically set the value to Hour.

many-to-one.name: unitMinutes
many-to-one.title: Minutes Unit
many-to-one.help: Allows defining the default unit for minutes in the software. Logically set the value to Minute.

boolean.name: teamManagement
boolean.title: Team Management
boolean.help: Allows activating team management in the Team Work module.

boolean.name: activateSendingEmail
boolean.title: Activate sending email
boolean.help: Allows activating the ability to send emails from Axelor.

boolean.name: activateBarCodeGeneration
boolean.title: Activate bar code generation for products
boolean.help: Allows generating a barcode on the product form.

boolean.name: enableMultiBarcodeOnProducts
boolean.title: Enable multi-barcode management on products
boolean.help: In addition to the main barcode, this feature allows you to enter a list of alternative barcodes to easily find the product on the application. Without the mobile app, these barcodes have only an informative value.

boolean.name: editProductBarcodeType
boolean.title: Edit product barcode type
boolean.help: If this option is unchecked, the barcode type on all products will be the one defined in the Barcode type configuration. If this option is enabled, it will be possible to modify the barcode type per product.

many-to-one.name: barcodeTypeConfig
many-to-one.title: Barcode Type
many-to-one.help: Allows defining the default barcode type. If the Edit product barcode type option is unchecked, this will be the default type for products. If the option is unchecked, this will be the default type but it can be modified on the product form. The field can be left empty, but it will need to be filled manually on the product form.

boolean.name: generateProductSequence
boolean.title: Generate sequence for products
boolean.help: This option allows defining a sequence for products. Each time a new product is created, a number will be automatically assigned to the product according to the configured sequence.

boolean.name: generatePartnerSequence
boolean.title: Generate sequence for partners
boolean.help: This option allows defining a sequence for partners. Each time a new partner is created, a number will be automatically assigned to the partner according to the configured sequence.

boolean.name: checkExistingSequenceOnGeneration
boolean.title: Check existing sequence on generation
boolean.help: If this configuration is enabled, each time a sequence is used to generate a number (for example on partners, accounting entries, customer quotations, etc.), the system will check in the database before generating a number if this number already exists and inform the user if it already exists.

integer.name: sequenceIncrementTimeout
integer.title: Sequence increment timeout (seconds)
integer.help: Maximum time to wait for sequence increment in isolated transaction. Default is 5 seconds.

boolean.name: manageMultiBanks
boolean.title: Manage multi banks
boolean.help: By activating multi-bank management, a new Company bank details field is added on quotations, invoices, and accounting entries, giving the possibility to choose the bank on each of these forms. This feature is useful if you have multiple banks/bank accounts.

boolean.name: manageProductVariants
boolean.title: Manage product variants
boolean.help: This option allows managing product variants. Once activated, you can create product templates in the product repository (App config/Repository/Products). From a template, you can create different variants of a product based on certain attributes (color, size, etc.).

boolean.name: enterpriseCommunication
boolean.title: Messaging
boolean.help: This option allows activating the Messenger application which is an internal messaging system with an inbox. You will receive in this messaging all internal ERP notifications.

boolean.name: document
boolean.title: Documents
boolean.help: This option allows activating electronic document management. The Documents application will become visible and will serve to import and export files, folders, and manage their tree structure.

boolean.name: enableTradingNamesManagement
boolean.help: This is the company name that identifies the business or the activity and that will be visible to the general public. The company will remain the legal entity on all documents but you can enter the relevant trading name for quotations, deliveries, invoices, etc., and display a different logo. In the Configurations tab of your company form, you can enter certain information about your company trading names.

boolean.name: enableCalendars
boolean.title: Calendar
boolean.help: Allows activating the Calendar menu visible in the left menu which allows the user to view their events and CRM events.

boolean.name: enableMultiCompany
boolean.title: Enable multi-company management
boolean.help: Allows managing multiple companies on a single instance.

boolean.name: activatePartnerRelations
boolean.title: Activate partner delegations
boolean.help: When you activate this configuration, you have the ability to define on partner forms relationships between different partners in terms of ordering, delivery, invoicing, and payment. You can indicate that in the case of an order from company A, the invoice will be in the name of company B, and that the paying party will be company C. These relationships will then have repercussions on the relevant modules and elements.

boolean.name: enableTaxNumbers
boolean.title: Enable tax numbers
boolean.help: This configuration enables the tax number feature. If disabled, the fiscal position no longer depends on tax numbers when creating an order.

many-to-one.name: passwordChangedTemplate
many-to-one.title: Template for changed password
many-to-one.help: This is the email template that is sent to the user when their password is changed by the administrator.

integer.name: limitNumberTasksGenerated
integer.title: Number of tasks generated at most at once

boolean.name: isSharedAddress
boolean.title: Shared address
boolean.help: If this option is enabled, in the address field of a partner, you can view all existing addresses in the software and select an existing one. If this option is disabled, you must create a new address each time you want to add one to a partner.

string.name: productSequenceTypeSelect
string.title: Sequence product type
string.help: Allows indicating whether you want to manage sequences per product or per product category. If per product, the sequence will increment with each product creation regardless of category. If per category, different sequences can be defined per product category, and the product number will depend on the sequence defined at its category level.

many-to-one.name: productSequence
many-to-one.title: Product sequence
many-to-one.help: Allows defining the default product sequence.

many-to-many.name: companySpecificProductFieldsSet
many-to-many.title: Company-specific product fields
many-to-many.help: It is possible to manage product attributes and management methods by company (internal companies, in the case of multi-company management). This allows defining differently by company elements such as procurement method, currency, sale price, purchase price, cost price, etc. You can select here the product fields you want to manage differently by company. This will add a panel on the product form to customize these elements by company. If you do not wish to use this feature, the table below must be empty.

one-to-many.name: globalTrackingConfigurationLines
one-to-many.help: Allows configuring traceability of actions performed on a field of a given object, in creation, deletion, update, export, and read.

many-to-one.name: defaultMailMessageTemplate
many-to-one.title: Default mail message template for notifications
many-to-one.help: Allows defining an email template that will be sent to users when they receive a Messenger notification.

one-to-many.name: mailTemplateAssociationList
one-to-many.title: Email template list for notifications
one-to-many.help: Allows defining different email templates for Messenger notifications depending on the source object of the notification (for example a quotation, an invoice, etc.).

boolean.name: manageSubsidiaryPartner
boolean.title: Manage subsidiaries on partners
boolean.help: Allows activating subsidiary management on partners, and thus defining a parent company / subsidiary relationship. On a parent company partner, the list of its subsidiaries appears.

integer.name: processTimeout
integer.title: Timeout for processes (seconds)
integer.help: Maximum waiting time for a process launched by the user before continuing in the background.

many-to-one.name: clientSituationPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Client situation template
many-to-one.help: You can select here a BIRT template for printing a client situation.

many-to-one.name: companyPhoneBookPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Company phone book template
many-to-one.help: You can select here a BIRT template for printing the company directory.

many-to-one.name: contactPhoneBookPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Contact phone book template
many-to-one.help: You can select here a BIRT template for printing the contact directory.

many-to-one.name: productCatalogPGQLPrintTemplate
many-to-one.title: Product catalog PGQL template
many-to-one.help: You can select here a BIRT template for printing the product catalog.

boolean.name: enablePricingScale
boolean.title: Enable pricing scale
boolean.help: This configuration enables the pricing scale feature. A pricing scale in AOS allows creating calculation rules to evaluate the field of an object (an order line, an order, a quotation, a stock move, etc.) based on parameters (called pricing rule).

boolean.name: isPricingComputingOrder
boolean.title: Pricing computing order
boolean.help: When selected, this is the pricing scale computation order.

boolean.name: isActivateInstanceInfoShortcut
boolean.title: Activate the instance information shortcut
boolean.help: This configuration allows quick access to the environment type and configured date and time.

string.name: shortcutMultiSelect
string.title: Activate changes shortcut for
string.help: This configuration allows to display a shortcut to switch active company/trading name/project of the current user.

integer.name: defaultBatchFetchLimit
integer.title: Default batch fetch limit
integer.help: Default fetch limit for batches. 0 will not be taken into account. In this case, the default value (10) will be used.

boolean.name: isRegistrationCodeCheckBlocking
boolean.title: Check duplicate registration
boolean.help: This configuration adds a warning when a partner is created if the registration code entered already exists in the database.

boolean.name: isGlobalDiscountEnabled
boolean.title: Enable global discount
boolean.help: Allow the user to apply a global discount on a sale order or invoice. Global discount and discount per line are not cumulative.
